problem.subtitle: Every month the same routine: chasing payments, hunting for contracts, putting together tax reports. There's a better way.

items.excel: Tracking payments in Excel or WhatsApp
items.contracts: Contracts scattered across email and drives
items.taxes: Scrambling on tax reports before the deadline

featurePayments.title: Never miss a rent payment again.
featurePayments.subtitle: Automatic payment generation, QR codes for tenants, and a reminder system that works for you.

auto.title: Automatic generation
auto.desc: On the 1st of every month the system creates a payment for every tenant.

qr.desc: Tenants get a reminder with a QR code 5 days before the due date.

reminders.desc: If unpaid, the system sends reminders on day 7 and day 14 after the due date.

b2bFeature.title: Managing properties for clients?
b2bFeature.subtitle: EstatIQ B2B is a platform for professional property managers. Multi-tenant architecture, roles and permissions, client portal.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant architecture
multiTenant.desc: Every client only sees their own properties. Data is strictly separated.

roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.desc: Super-Admin, Manager, Accountant, Viewer — everyone sees what they should.

clientPortal.title: Client portal
clientPortal.desc: Property owners get a read-only overview. No more monthly PDFs.

reports.title: Reports and exports
reports.desc: Occupancy, income, and expense reports for every client.

1.text: I've finally stopped chasing tenants for payments. Reminders go out automatically and I see everything in one dashboard.
1.name: Thomas K.

2.text: The tax export saved me two days of work at year-end. Great app — I recommend it to anyone with more than one property.
2.name: Petra M.

3.text: We moved 120 units to EstatIQ. Clients love the portal — no more monthly Excel reports.
3.name: Jan R.

1.q: How quickly can I get started?
1.a: Sign-up takes 60 seconds. After logging in the onboarding wizard walks you through everything — you can have your first property and tenant online in 5 minutes.

2.q: Do I need a credit card right away?
2.a: No. The Free plan is completely free with no time limit. You only enter a credit card when upgrading to a paid plan.

3.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
3.a: Your data stays safe. You move to read-only mode — you can see everything but can't add new records. You can return any time.

4.q: How does the tenant invitation work?
4.a: You enter the tenant's name and email. The system sends an invitation with a one-time token valid for 72 hours. The tenant activates their own account.

5.a: Yes. Data is stored on European servers. Tenants can request an export or deletion of their data any time through the portal.

6.q: Does EstatIQ work for property management firms?
6.a: Yes, we have B2B plans from CZK 2,500/month for firms managing 50–400+ units. Contact us for a demo.

7.a: Yes. EstatIQ is fully responsive — it works perfectly on your phone, tablet and desktop. No installation needed, just open your browser.

8.a: After you invite your tenant, they get their own login where they can see their payment status, contracts, and send you a message. Fewer calls and emails for you.

foundingMembers.title: Be first. Shape the product.
foundingMembers.subtitle: EstatIQ is looking for its first founding members. The benefits you get now, later users will never have.
foundingMembers.urgency: Accepting the first 50 paying founding members

1.title: Price locked forever
1.desc: The founder plan never increases in price. You pay today's price forever — no matter what comes next.

2.title: Direct access to the founder
2.desc: Krystof will personally help you with setup and onboarding. Your feedback goes straight into the roadmap.

3.title: Influence what we build
3.desc: Features designed by founding members get priority. You decide what comes next.

whatWeDo.title: A rental management assistant — simply.
whatWeDo.subtitle: Imagine someone watching over payments every month for you, sending reminders to tenants, archiving contracts and preparing a tax overview. That's exactly what EstatIQ does.

1.title: Everything in one place
1.desc: Instead of three different apps and a folder of papers, you have everything — contracts, payments, tenants, energy — in one simple application on desktop and mobile.

2.title: Works automatically for you
2.desc: EstatIQ generates payments every month, sends tenants a reminder with a QR code, and alerts you if someone hasn't paid. Without any effort from you.

3.title: Taxes and documents without the stress
3.desc: With one click you get an income and expense overview ready for your accountant or tax return. No more manual spreadsheets in Excel.

timeSavings.title: 3 hours saved every week.
timeSavings.subtitle: Count it yourself: checking payments every month, writing reminders, finding contracts, preparing reports — that's dozens of hours a year. EstatIQ handles it all — automatically, reliably, without errors.

1.title: We check payments for you
1.desc: The system tracks who paid and who didn't. You see it on a clear dashboard in real time — no more going through bank statements.

2.title: We send reminders for you
2.desc: 5 days before, on the due date, and 7 and 14 days after — the tenant gets an email with a QR code for immediate payment. You don't have to do anything.

3.title: Tax export in a minute
3.desc: No manual compilation. Export an income and expense overview by property in one click, whenever you need — for yourself or your accountant.

whyUs.title: 6 reasons landlords choose EstatIQ.
whyUs.subtitle: An app alone isn't enough. You need a system you trust that actually works for you. Here's why EstatIQ delivers.

1.title: Everything in one place
1.desc: Payments, contracts, tenants, energy, taxes — no switching between Excel, email and a folder.

2.title: Set up in 5 minutes
2.desc: No complex configuration. A wizard walks you through step by step. Then the system works on its own — every month.

3.title: Bank-level security
3.desc: Data stored in the EU, encrypted. Fully GDPR compliant. Your contracts and payments are safe.

4.title: Happy tenant
4.desc: A dedicated tenant portal — they see payments, contracts and a QR code. Fewer calls and emails to you.

5.title: Tax export in one click
5.desc: Structured overview for your accountant ready instantly. Save hours of work before every tax deadline.

6.title: Support within 24 hours
6.desc: Real people who will respond. No chatbots, no week-long waits. We reply in English and Czech.

comparison.title: How is EstatIQ better than what you use now?
comparison.subtitle: Most landlords start with Excel and WhatsApp. It works — but only for a while. See what you're missing.
comparison.note: Comparison is indicative. EstatIQ continuously adds new features — always free for existing users.

about.title: We built this because rental management frustrated us.
about.story: I was a landlord with four apartments and every month I spent hours checking payments in Excel, writing reminders via WhatsApp, and hunting for contracts in email. Once I forgot about an insurance expiry. That was the turning point. I created EstatIQ so it would never happen to anyone else.
about.missionTitle: Rental as passive income — for real.
about.missionDesc: We believe property management shouldn't be a second job. Landlords should focus on what brings them joy — not paperwork. EstatIQ automates the routine so you can live your life.

1.title: Simplicity
1.desc: Even someone who has never seen property management software can use it. We design for people, not technicians.

2.title: Trust
2.desc: We treat money and contracts as our own. Security and GDPR compliance are a given.

3.title: Automation
3.desc: If a computer can do it, we won't bother you with it. Your time is precious.

contact.title: We're here for you.
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Want to see a demo? Or just want to talk before signing up? Write to us — we respond within 24 hours on business days.
contact.formNote: We respond within 24 business hours. No spam, no sales calls.
contact.demoDesc: 30 minutes online — we'll show you everything live with your data.
